wordplay_note: The new Adam discovering the truth above ground
card_description: Joseph Adams (meaning "Adams = first man") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Penultimate Truth*. Documentary filmmaker who discovers that World War III ended years ago while millions remain underground. Name note: The new Adam discovering the truth above ground. The man who learns the penultimate truth — the war is a lie. First appears in *The Penultimate Truth*.

reference.brief: Documentary filmmaker who discovers that World War III ended years ago while millions remain underground
reference.significance: The man who learns the penultimate truth — the war is a lie
